title: Kanbus clock: transition FROM/TO status line overflow

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implementing UI fix: state_transition notices will use separate lines for FROM and TO statuses to avoid horizontal overflow on-device.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented transition layout change: body now renders issue, FROM, from_status, TO, to_status on separate lines. Also adjusted notice row-height to support up to 5 body lines. Validation: py_compile + tests/test_kanbus_clock.py (13 passed). Triggered state transition event on kanbus-8cf9b8 for visual verification.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Closing: transition cards now render issue/FROM/status/TO/status on separate rows and no longer overflow horizontally in live testing.
